title: ficus catesbaei
intro: Ficus catesbaei, also known as the small-leafed or swamp ficus, is a species of fig tree native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficus catesbaei include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Ficus catesbaei is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to salves and creams for topical application.
